prompts: /plan "in the apps/plugin project we form fill a marketplace listing draft. We have a error to solve. When we form fill the 'Location' which is the listing address, it is an automcomplete combobox. We are properly clicking the combobox to open the autocomplete options, we are correctly setting the autocomplete input value to update the autocomplete results. However we are not selecting the first autocomplete option in the list (usually by clicking it) and then sending a blur event or some such event to have the autocomplete close"
